name: rldyour-browser
description: Skills-only browser validation and debugging workflows for Playwright MCP and Chrome DevTools MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Playwright validation and Chrome DevTools debugging
interface.longDescription: This skills-only plugin defines browser workflows for Codex. Playwright MCP is the primary tool for user-flow reproduction, functional validation, business-logic verification, screenshots, accessibility snapshots, storage/network/testing assertions, and pixel-perfect UI checks. Chrome DevTools MCP is the primary tool for console, network, DOM/runtime, layout, Lighthouse, performance trace, and deeper browser debugging. Browser artifacts such as screenshots, videos, traces, PDFs, and temporary evidence must be written under browser/ and treated as ignored local artifacts unless the owner explicitly asks to preserve them.
defaultPrompt: Validate this implementation in the browser.
Debug this UI issue with browser tools.
Check the page pixel-perfect and functionally.
